1|import csv
   2|from collections import defaultdict
   3|
   4|# 读取CSV文件
   5|file_path = r"D:\项目类\CLI_lite应用\CLI_lite\data\output\test_sales.csv"
   6|
   7|sales_data = []
   8|with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   9|    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
  10|    for row in reader:
  11|        sales_data.append(row)
  12|
  13|# 计算总销售额
  14|total_sales = sum(float(row['销售额']) for row in sales_data)
  15|
  16|# 按产品类别统计
  17|category_sales = defaultdict(float)
  18|for row in sales_data:
  19|    category_sales[row['产品类别']] += float(row['销售额'])
  20|
  21|# 计算类别占比
  22|category_percentage = {}
  23|for category, amount in category_sales.items():
  24|    category_percentage[category] = (amount / total_sales) * 100
  25|
  26|# 按区域统计
  27|region_sales = defaultdict(float)
  28|for row in sales_data:
  29|    region_sales[row['区域']] += float(row['销售额'])
  30|
  31|# 区域销售额排序
  32|sorted_regions = sorted(region_sales.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
  33|
